mems.content: SESSION 2 COMPLETE (2026-02-25). Code Intelligence Engine Phase 2: tree-sitter-loader.ts (370 LOC), signature-extractor.ts (761 LOC), compressed-codemap.ts (333 LOC), incremental-updater.ts (195 LOC), watch-integration.ts (241 LOC), index.ts barrel (41 LOC, 25+ exports). Tests: 20 new (phase2-compressed-codemap 8, phase2-incremental-updater 7, phase2-watch-integration 5). Quality gate: TSC 0, 37/37 pass.

Session 3 Phase 3 cognitive integration COMPLETE. Built 3 new modules (selective-injector, pattern-search, knowledge-commits) + extended cognitive-packer.ts with <source_code> XML section. 26 new tests, 63/63 total. Two bugs found and fixed during testing: (1) selective-injector budget underestimation — switched from estimateTokens() to proportional per-signature cost, (2) knowledge-commits non-deterministic summary — switched from new Date() to codemap.createdAt. Commit cc7d3b5.

Session 4: Built Track A (hivemind_codemap tool — 6 actions exposing code-intel engine to agents) and Track B (Q.U.A.N.T. Matrix — schema + evaluator + hivemind_ideate tool + skill + command). 9 files, 1100 LOC total (source + tests). All code-intel tests 87/87 pass, TSC 0 errors. Registered both tools in index.ts barrel.

## Framework Vision Summary (2026-02-25)

**Core Philosophy:**
- 4-Layer Architecture: Hooks (reactive) → Tools (write path) → SDK (capabilities) → Sidecar TUI (observability)
- CQRS enforcement: Hooks READ-ONLY, Tools WRITE-ONLY
- Context-first governance: declare_intent → map_context → execution → checkpoint

**Key Entities:**
- Session → Trajectory → Plan → Phase → Task → Mem (with UUID FKs)
- 17 canonical hook types (H01-H17)
- 4 gate types: auto-gate, soft-gate, hard-gate, human-gate

**Session Intelligence Specs:**
- Auto-new-session: SDK-driven via ctx.client.session.create()
- Improved compact: context-doctor + navigation + mapping + turn-anchoring
- Defensive: Don't split at >=80%, max 3 compacts then auto-new-session

**Code-Intel Status:**
- Phase 1: COMPLETE (8 files, 467 LOC, scanner/token-counter/secret-detector)
- Phase 2: COMPLETE (signature-extractor, tree-sitter-loader)
- Phase 3: IN PROGRESS (selective-injector, pattern-search)

**Current Execution Phase:**
- Knot 1: COMPLETE (2026-02-24)
- Phase B (Session Intelligence): NEXT
- 84 total issues tracked across Phases B-E

**Critical Gaps:**
- CF-D2-03: 3-level vs 6-level hierarchy model mismatch
- CF-D5-01: tool-gate advisory-only (no hard enforcement)
- CF-D1-01-04: Missing Zod schemas for runtime entities

Session 5 Research Synthesis (2026-02-25): 4 parallel agents scanned entire project. Key findings: (1) Framework vision well-defined in forming-the-own-framework.md — 4-layer architecture, 17 canonical hooks H01-H17, CQRS contract. (2) SDK has 6 FALSE claims in planning docs — session.create() WORKS, noReply prompts available, session.idle event exists, file.watcher.updated available, find.symbols() for LSP, tool blocking unreliable in v1.1+. (3) Code-intel Phases 1-2 complete, Phase 3 NOT started. (4) Schema layer biggest gap — 14 proposed schemas missing. (5) Ecosystem 85% complete: 42 commands, 27 skills, 15 workflows, 8 agents. (6) Brain-state has NO Zod schema (TS-only), hierarchy.ts NO Zod, config.ts NO Zod.

SDK FALSE CLAIMS TO FIX: (1) 'Plugins cant create sessions' → FALSE: client.session.create() works. (2) 'Cant inject context without AI response' → FALSE: noReply:true exists. (3) 'Tool hooks can block execution' → PARTIALLY FALSE: v1.1+ doesnt enforce. (4) 'No file watching API' → FALSE: file.watcher.updated event exists. (5) 'No session idle detection' → FALSE: session.idle event exists. (6) 'Cant access LSP from plugins' → FALSE: find.symbols() and lsp.client.diagnostics available. UNLOCKED CAPABILITIES: session branching via session.children(), structured output via format.json_schema, session.abort() and session.revert().

Session 5 Wave 1 AUDIT SYNTHESIS (2026-02-25): ECOSYSTEM HEALTH 72/100. CRITICAL GAPS: (1) Codemap EMPTY - .hivemind/codemap/manifest.json has nodes:[], (2) Codewiki EMPTY - .hivemind/codewiki/manifest.json has articles:[], (3) 51+ naming violations (dates in filenames), (4) No GSD-style phase structure, (5) 15 files >550 LOC need splitting (graph-io.ts 1349, planning-fs.ts 1107, hierarchy-tree.ts 1070, detection.ts 883), (6) 10+ orphan lib files (brownfield-scan.ts, auto-context.ts, mems.ts, tool-activation.ts, file-lock.ts, project-scan.ts, watcher.ts), (7) state/tasks.json has session_id:"unknown" FK violation, (8) 9 thin alias commands should merge into hivefiver.md, (9) 3 SDK purity violations in lib (compaction-engine.ts, auto-commit.ts, session-governance.ts import from hooks), (10) 0 CQRS violations (clean). Code-intel Phase 3 IS COMPLETE (contradiction resolved via anchor evidence).

GSD PATTERNS TO ADOPT: (1) Phase directory structure: .planning/phases/XX-name/XX-YY-TYPE.md where TYPE=PLAN,RESEARCH,SUMMARY,CONTEXT,UAT,VERIFICATION. (2) PLAN.md frontmatter: phase, plan, type, wave, depends_on, files_modified, autonomous, requirements[], must_haves{truths,artifacts,key_links}. (3) Workflow lifecycle: research→discuss→plan→execute→verify. (4) Goal-backward methodology: State Goal→Observable Truths→Required Artifacts→Required Wiring→Key Links. (5) 8-point verification dimensions. (6) Wave-based parallel execution. (7) Deviation rules for executors (auto-fix bugs=ok, architecture changes=STOP). (8) Checkpoint types: human-verify(90%), decision(9%), human-action(1%). (9) STATE.md for human-readable session state alongside brain.json. (10) Per-task atomic commits with conventional format and phase-plan prefix.
